pathways.name: Incremental Enhancement
pathways.rationale: Existing diagnostics and health-check scripts indicate continuous hardening path.
actions: Run tnf:doctor and improver:scan on schedule
Promote failing checks to actionable tasks
Track closure rate of TODO/FIXME items

pathways.name: Capability Addition
pathways.rationale: Large skill inventory indicates capacity to add specialized capabilities quickly.
actions: Expand MCP connectors where signal density is high
Template new agent personas for repetitive ops

pathways.name: Pattern Refinement
pathways.rationale: High volume of docs and workflow references supports standardization for lower variance.
actions: Normalize health metrics schema across services
Reduce duplicate scripts with shared utilities

pathways.name: Emergent Synthesis
pathways.rationale: Cross-system integration signals suggest strong potential from combining orchestration + monitoring + learning loops.
actions: Link orchestration events to learning artifacts
Score workflow outcomes and feed routing decisions
